description: kiho v5.22 runtime gates. PreToolUse hooks that turn two long-standing invariants into enforced gates: (1) direct Writes to agent.md files must go through the recruit skill; (2) direct Writes/Edits to .kiho/kb/wiki/ must go through kiho-kb-manager. See plugins/kiho/bin/hooks/ for the hook runner scripts and CHANGELOG.md v5.22 for rationale.
